hero.subtitle: The Ultimate Connection
hero.description: Impulls is a spatial ecosystem designed for deep focus, immersive collaboration, and absolute privacy.

extra_markdown.title: Extra Markdown
extra_markdown.description: Extended for your messages. Format the code, tables, and lists directly in the chat.

encrypted.title: E2E Encrypted
encrypted.description: Your data is yours. We use military-grade encryption for every byte.

custom_room_system.title: Custom Room System
custom_room_system.description: A new flexible chat management system. Configure privacy, roles, and access rights for any task.

hero.description: Extend Impulls with our powerful, native Messenger API. Build custom bots, automate workflows, or integrate your own tools directly into the chat experience.

features_list.feature4: Native support for spatial audio triggers

edge_infrastructure.title: Edge Infrastructure
edge_infrastructure.description: 12,000+ nodes globally ensure your data travels at the speed of light, with sub-20ms latency in every major city.

zero_trust.title: Zero Trust
zero_trust.description: Decentralized identity management means we never hold your keys.

self_destruct_ode.title: Self-Destruct Mode
self_destruct_ode.description: Set timers for messages to vanish without a trace.

smart_routing_engine.title: Smart Routing Engine
smart_routing_engine.description: Our AI-driven traffic management dynamically reroutes requests to the healthiest node, bypassing network congestion in real-time.

stay_ahead_of_the_curve.title: Stay Ahead of the Curve
stay_ahead_of_the_curve.description: Explore our latest protocol updates, security patches, and deep-dive technical articles in our community hub.
